button.name: action_process_with_ai
button.onclick: setTimeout(() => { const aiButton = document.querySelector('.o-mail-Chatter-aiChat'); if (aiButton) { aiButton.click(); setTimeout(() => { const composer = document.querySelector('.o-llm-composer-area textarea, .o-mail-Composer-input'); if (composer) { composer.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' }); composer.focus(); } }, 300); } }, 100);
